name: Alchemy
description: Alchemy — Blockchain developer platform providing reliable node infrastructure and enhanced APIs for Ethereum and other chains.

seo.title: Alchemy — Developer Portals / API Management
seo.meta_description: Alchemy: Alchemy — Blockchain developer platform providing reliable node infrastructure and enhanced APIs for Ethereum and other chains.

when_to_use: Reliable Ethereum node access for DeFi dapp
Enhanced NFT APIs for marketplace metadata queries
Webhook notifications for on-chain transaction events
Trace APIs for in-depth smart contract debugging
Websocket subscriptions for real-time blockchain data

pros: Enhanced APIs simplify token and NFT queries
cons: Costs escalate quickly past free tier
Some chains lag Alchemy Ethereum quality
review.verdict: The default for serious Ethereum dev infra, with polish and enhanced APIs rivals have yet to match.
review.best_for: Ethereum and EVM-chain dapp teams wanting reliable nodes plus enriched NFT/token APIs
review.not_for: Budget projects or teams committed to decentralized/self-hosted RPC

lock_in.reason: Standard JSON-RPC endpoints, portable to other node providers

developer_experience.reason: Excellent Web3 docs, SDKs in JS/Python, dev portal
